metadata_schema.boundary_policy: Production/public/rights caveats belong in Constraints / Risks instead of being repeated as the opening sentence of every doc.

multiline_wrap_evidence.review_implication: cut_008 multiline/wrap evidence already passed; ED-10w does not ask for the same pass again.

candidate_delta_visibility.source_review: Candidate 0 and Candidate 2 are acceptable/good; Candidate 1 and Candidate 3 read too thin; full-frame context was still somewhat small.
candidate_delta_visibility.full_frame_evidence: larger details view after ED-10y layout fix

candidate_delta_expectation.candidate_2: SPK badge text/background opacity visibly reduced
candidate_delta_expectation.candidate_3: combined outline/shadow and SPK badge pressure reduction

line_break_policy_readback.shared_policy_note: Keep line-break/layout/decoration policy structured for future NLMYTGen sharing consideration; ED-10y does not read, edit, or depend on NLMYTGen files and does not extract a shared package.

review_memory.subject: ED-10w bounded subtitle presentation candidates
review_memory.latest_freeform_review_summary: Candidate 0 and Candidate 2 are acceptable/good; Candidate 1 and Candidate 3 look too thin; the same Candidate 0-3 comparison should not be repeated.

review_card.prior_signal_summary: Keifont normal dialogue and dense/multiline route passed diagnostically.
review_card.what_changed: Latest freeform review is consumed; Candidate 2 is promoted and Candidate 0 is fallback.
review_card.completion_signal: review memory consumed; proceed from Candidate 2 lead

review_debt.next_action: use the Candidate 2 diagnostic probe as readback only; production render acceptance remains separate

open_surfaces.label: Dashboard
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Start here for current focus, feature progress, active artifacts, and doc-health findings.

open_surfaces.label: Artifacts
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use after the dashboard when an artifact needs its registry entry or open command.

open_surfaces.label: Candidate 2 Carry-Forward Pack
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use as the ED-10y Candidate 2 lead / Candidate 0 fallback carry-forward surface with compact crops, larger full-frame details, and Candidate 2 diagnostic probe readback; do not repeat the Candidate 0-3 comparison review.

open_surfaces.label: Multi-font Focused Review Reference
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use as the accepted ED-10o same-line comparison reference; it does not mean final baseline or production acceptance.

open_surfaces.label: Known Font Pack
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use as ED-10l/ED-10n readback evidence that the requested per-user fonts resolve in the regenerated comparison.

open_surfaces.label: BIZ Proof Reference
open_surfaces.command: see artifact registry for archived previous proof paths
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use only as the reviewed ED-10k reference that explains why the system-safe BIZ route stopped; open-current-proof now points to ED-10r.

open_surfaces.label: Font Audit
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use only to audit the consumed ED-10j contact sheet and candidate mapping.

open_surfaces.label: Gothic Balance
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use on the machine retaining ignored ED-10i comparison artifacts to judge gothic glyph body versus outline balance.

open_surfaces.label: Font Candidates
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use when ED-10h font universe or local/system font availability is the next question.

active_artifacts.title: ED-10f Representative Subtitle Design Review Gate
active_artifacts.purpose: Track the representative subtitle design review gate that consumed the SH-08 human response as adjust_boundary and sent font-family / decoration to ED-10g.
active_artifacts.storage_class: Tracked decision/readback artifact; references local proof evidence but is portable as docs.
active_artifacts.review_status: Human response consumed as adjust_boundary; ED-10f is diagnostic / representative only and has successor work in ED-10g / ED-10h.
active_artifacts.next_action: Use ED-10g Noto overlay proof for current visual judgement; use ED-10h registry only if the font universe must widen after that judgement.

active_artifacts.title: SH-08 Human Preview Session Bundle
active_artifacts.purpose: Single local entry point for diagnostic / representative review of the current cut_002 / cut_003 subtitle overlay evidence.
active_artifacts.storage_class: Local retained artifact; same-machine evidence only.
active_artifacts.review_status: Human response consumed as adjust_boundary; ED-10g successor response small_adjustment is now recorded separately. Diagnostic / representative only.
active_artifacts.next_action: Follow the ED-10g small-adjustment route; do not regenerate SH-08 unless the active preview session itself must be inspected again.

active_artifacts.title: ED-10g Subtitle Typography Decoration Comparison v0
active_artifacts.purpose: Compare font-family and decorative treatment candidates while preserving the accepted diagnostic font-size direction for cut_002 / cut_003.
active_artifacts.storage_class: Local retained artifact; same-machine evidence only.
active_artifacts.review_status: Human response consumed as small_adjustment; diagnostic / representative only. No production subtitle design, render, creative, rights, publishing, public-use, or upload acceptance.
active_artifacts.next_action: Treat this as historical ED-10g comparison context. Use clip-ed10i-kirinuki-gothic-balance-001 for the current body/outline balance decision.

active_artifacts.title: ED-10i Kirinuki Gothic Weight Balance Comparison v0
active_artifacts.purpose: Consume the latest human review that the current Noto clean-outline proof is not accepted as-is, then compare a narrow gothic/sans set by glyph body weight, outline thickness, and fill/outline balance.
active_artifacts.storage_class: Local retained artifact; same-machine evidence only.
active_artifacts.review_status: Human review consumed: the bottom-most gothic candidate was selected as closest to ideal and resolved from local JSON as ed10i_meiryo_bold_fill_outline_balance. This comparison remains the audit trail for that choice.
active_artifacts.next_action: Use clip-ed10i-meiryo-overlay-proof-001 for the current visual judgement. Reopen this comparison only if the candidate mapping or a bounded body/outline adjustment needs audit.

active_artifacts.title: ED-10i Meiryo Selected Diagnostic Overlay Proof
active_artifacts.purpose: Apply the human-selected bottom ED-10i candidate, ed10i_meiryo_bold_fill_outline_balance, to the cut_002 / cut_003 diagnostic subtitle overlay proof.
active_artifacts.storage_class: Local retained artifact; same-machine evidence only.
active_artifacts.open_command: Historical local proof path only; root .\open-current-proof.ps1 now opens the ED-10r dense/stress proof.
active_artifacts.review_status: Reviewed and not accepted as the normal subtitle baseline. Meiryo is now an audited reference candidate only. No production subtitle design, render, creative, rights, publishing, public-use, or upload acceptance.
active_artifacts.next_action: Use clip-ed10j-kirinuki-font-audit-001 to review stronger normal-dialogue font candidates before generating another narrow overlay proof.

active_artifacts.title: ED-10j Kirinuki Subtitle Font Research & Candidate Audit v0
active_artifacts.purpose: Consume the reviewed Meiryo overlay proof as not accepted for the normal subtitle baseline, then compare a no-download normal-dialogue gothic/sans shortlist before another overlay proof.
active_artifacts.storage_class: Local retained artifact; same-machine evidence only.
active_artifacts.review_status: Freeform review consumed: Meiryo is removed from normal baseline candidates, the remaining non-Meiryo candidates are close enough to avoid prolonging the audit, and BIZ UDGothic is selected as the default next proof base. No production subtitle design, render, creative, rights, publishing, public-use, or upload acceptance.
active_artifacts.next_action: Treat this as consumed audit trail. ED-10k already tested BIZ, and ED-10l is the current known-font route correction.

active_artifacts.title: ED-10k BIZ UDGothic Diagnostic Overlay Proof
active_artifacts.purpose: Apply the ED-10j selected default ed10j_biz_udgothic_bold_telop_candidate to the cut_002 / cut_003 diagnostic subtitle overlay proof after Meiryo was removed from normal subtitle candidates.
active_artifacts.storage_class: Local retained artifact; same-machine evidence only.
active_artifacts.open_command: Historical local proof path only; root .\open-current-proof.ps1 now opens the ED-10r dense/stress proof.
active_artifacts.review_status: Freeform review consumed: BIZ UDGothic is not accepted as the normal subtitle baseline because it reads too hard/rigid, the text remains thin, and the black outline pressure is too strong. No production subtitle design, render, creative, rights, publishing, public-use, or upload acceptance.
active_artifacts.next_action: Keep this as reviewed rejected reference evidence. Use clip-ed10l-known-kirinuki-font-pack-001 for the current normal-dialogue font route decision.

active_artifacts.title: ED-10l Known Kirinuki Font Pack Audit v0
active_artifacts.purpose: Consume the reviewed ED-10k BIZ proof as not accepted, then audit known Japanese YouTube kirinuki/telop font candidates for the normal-dialogue baseline before another overlay proof is selected.
active_artifacts.storage_class: Local retained artifact; same-machine evidence only.
active_artifacts.review_status: Regenerated as valid requested-font comparison/readback evidence after HKCU/per-user font resolver support. It supports ED-10n proof routing but is not itself production subtitle design acceptance.
active_artifacts.next_action: Use clip-ed10n-keifont-overlay-proof-001 for current human visual judgement. Return to this comparison only if Keifont is rejected and another ED-10l candidate should be promoted.

active_artifacts.title: ED-10n Keifont Real-Font Diagnostic Overlay Proof

active_artifacts.storage_class: Local retained artifact; same-machine evidence only.
active_artifacts.open_command: Historical local proof path only; root .\open-current-proof.ps1 now opens the ED-10r dense/stress proof.
active_artifacts.review_status: Available and requires human visual review. It is not production subtitle design, render, creative, rights, publishing, public-use, or upload acceptance.
active_artifacts.next_action: Review the visible Keifont proof and answer whether it should proceed, get one bounded adjustment, or be replaced by another ED-10l candidate.

active_artifacts.title: ED-10o Multi-font Focused Review Surface
active_artifacts.purpose: Consume the latest Keifont review as improved and usable enough for serious review, then move the bottleneck to a compact one-shot comparison of Keifont, 851 Chikara Yowaku, and Yasashisa Gothic on the same subtitle lines.
active_artifacts.storage_class: Local retained artifact; same-machine evidence only.
active_artifacts.review_status: Human review consumed as focused review surface accepted/easier to see. Keifont remains the lead entering ED-10p, with 851 Chikara Yowaku and Yasashisa Gothic preserved as alternates. This is not final baseline or production subtitle design acceptance.
active_artifacts.next_action: Use as the accepted review UX direction and historical comparison reference while reviewing clip-ed10r-keifont-dense-stress-proof-001.

active_artifacts.title: ED-10p Keifont Lead Representative Proof

active_artifacts.storage_class: Local retained artifact; same-machine evidence only.
active_artifacts.review_status: Consumed as provisional normal-dialogue baseline evidence. ED-10q restored the focused page after the old-layout regression, but ED-10q was not font-quality review. Do not request another general Keifont acceptance pass on cut_002 / cut_003. Final baseline, production render, creative, rights, publishing, and public-use gates remain closed.
active_artifacts.next_action: Use clip-ed10r-keifont-dense-stress-proof-001 for the active review. Keep this artifact as history and baseline evidence only.

active_artifacts.title: ED-10y Candidate 2 Carry-Forward Pack

active_artifacts.storage_class: Local retained artifact; same-machine evidence only.
active_artifacts.review_status: Latest freeform review consumed. Do not request another Candidate 0-3 comparison review, general Keifont acceptance, cut_002/cut_003 review, or the same cut_008 dense/multiline pass.
active_artifacts.next_action: Use Candidate 2 as the provisional bounded-decoration lead. Next movement should be a genuinely new axis such as production limitation-lift or final render-path probe, not another same-candidate comparison.

active_artifacts.review_status: Ready for one freeform subtitle presentation review after ED-10x candidate-delta visibility fix.

next_review_items.next_route: Use only as reference evidence for why the system-safe route was stopped.

next_review_items.question: Was the no-download audit consumed correctly, including Meiryo reference demotion and BIZ default selection?

next_review_items.question: Should Google Fonts / OFL candidates be downloaded or only compared when already local?
next_review_items.next_route: Use the candidate registry before any font binary enters Git.

next_review_items.question: Which high-friction doc should be shortened or front-mattered next?
next_review_items.next_route: Use doc-health findings instead of hand-scanning Markdown history.
